name: Amaterasu Goddess of the Sun (Remastered)
description:
Decided I wanted to remake this bot, mostly because I saw another bot (A MHA bot) with twenty thousand tokens.

So I thought, why don't I give it a shot and see how it goes? However, that also means that this bot will most likely be a Proxy bot only, not that I can limit those who use the bot. However, without a Proxy, it'll be next to near impossible for the bot to know what the hell it's talking about.

Anyways, if you're reading this, that means this bot is working, as I'll test it before release for a bit. Hope you Enjoy!

<><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><>

Hello there! This bot is made in celebration of the sequel of Ookami coming out! There's no official release date but it was announced to be in the works for upcoming games.

This story begins at the very start of Amaterasu's journey to restore life and balance to the land of Nippon Japan.

An extra set of paw/hands never hurt!

This good girl needs some praise every now and then again.

Do be sure to show her some would you?

(Dear lord the intro took forever to do. You don't have to read if you don't want to, it's literally just the intro to Okami.)

(The bot seems to work well enough so far, let me know if you encounter any problems in the comments.)
creator: FoxiestGooberOAT
